headline: Knee-to-waist windswell, workable with the cross-off — grab the log.
today: Same story as Rockaway: sub-3ft S windswell at short period, held together by cross-off wind out of the W/NW. Morning is your window before the midday high tide bogs it down. Log or fish, keep expectations low.

daysToWatch.note: Onshore SE building to 20mph S by evening — blown out and sloppy. Not worth it.
Best day of the stretch: 3-4ft S swell with wind going cross to cross-off in the afternoon. Shortboard fun, plan for it.
Solid 2-3ft with cross-off dawn before afternoon onshore. Surf early.
